title: i hate manipulation and kindness
author: corbin
body:
i spent most of my life being nice. i thought if i just did what i was
supposed to do and helped people out, maybe things would click and i'd
figure out how to live in this world. i really tried to be warm and
caring to everyone around me, but it was such a fucking mistake. being kind got me nowhere except massive disappointment and just feeling way more exhausted. i realized
eventually that kindness isn't even a real thing. its just manipulation.
people just use it to get validation or to make you do stuff for them.
by acting nice i was basically just letting everyone walk all over me.
they didnt care about me at all though. they just used me for whatever
they could get and called it being good people.
realizing i actually played along with this bs for years makes me
physically sick. sometimes ill just be sitting alone thinking about how
hard i tried to be normal, smiling at people like a complete idiot, and
i actually throw up. i'm not exaggerating. i get so disgusted by how
pathetic i was that my body rejects it.
it honestly bleeds into everything else too. like eating. just the thought
of shoving food down my throat to keep this useless body going is
so humiliating. i hate it. usually after i eat i just feel so grossed
out by having it sitting in my stomach that i force myself to puke it
back up.
i just purge it all out. people would probably call it some kind of
disorder or say i'm depressed but they don't even know what they're talking
about. this shit is NORMAL- its not a sickness. i'm not a fuckin' zombie. i've got nothing to be sad about when others go thru way worse shit every fucking day
